steps.speaker: Kisame
steps.text: Heh heh. Itachi's gone soft. Me? I'll just chop you up and let Samehada drink. Don't worry — I'll leave enough to carry the fox.
He slams his bandaged blade down. Water erupts, swallowing the road into a churning dome.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: Under all this water his Water Style hits like a truck — and our fire's useless! Squad, adapt! Believe it!

boss.victory_text: Samehada is torn from Kisame's grip. He laughs as the dome collapses. 'Not bad, brat. We'll be seeing you.'
